zh.Shepton Montague, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Montacute於1311年出生在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古時，她的父親William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu36歲，母親Elizabeth De Montfort39歲。她於1333年1月27日與Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1346年2月7日在英國享年35歲。

zh-hans.South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾素斯 英格萊比
zh-hans.Shepton Montague, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Montacute于1311年出生在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古时，她的父亲William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu36岁，母亲Elizabeth De Montfort39岁。她于1333年1月27日与Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1346年2月7日在英国享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Montacute
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Montacute was born in 1311, in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England, her father, William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu, was 36 and her mother, Elizabeth De Montfort, was 39. She married Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny on 27 January 1333, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 7 February 1346, in England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Montacute est née en 1311, à Shepton Montague, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Montfort, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny le 27 janvier 1333, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 février 1346, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Montacute 1311 in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu 36 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth De Montfort 39. Sie hat am 27. Januar 1333 in England Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Februar 1346 im Alter von 35 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Montacute è nata il nel 1311 nel Shepton Montague, Somerset, England, sua padre, William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth De Montfort, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny il 27 gennaio 1333, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 febbraio 1346, nel England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Montacuteが1311年にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグーで生まれた時，父William Montagu 2nd Baron Montaguは36歳，母Elizabeth De Montfortは39歳であった。1333年1月27日にイギリスでRalph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubenyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1346年2月7日にイギリスで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Montacute(이)가 1311년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 몽아구에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth De Montfort(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 1333년 1월 27일 영국에서 Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1346년 2월 7일 영국에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Shepton Montague, Somerset, England: Shepton Montague, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Montacute nasceu em 1311, em Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth De Montfort, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny em 27 de janeiro de 1333, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1346, em Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Montacute родилась в 1311 г. в местности шептон монтагу, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Montfort, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny 27 января 1333 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 февраля 1346 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Montacute nació en 1311, en Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, William Montagu 2nd Baron Montagu, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth De Montfort, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Ralph d'Aubeney 2nd Baron Daubeny el 27 de enero de 1333, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de febrero de 1346, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
